arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa complete second January transfer as defender signs on
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of right-back Andres Garcia from Levante. Bade signed a long-term deal with the Spanish club last year, but Sevilla are open to selling him for the right price.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs Aston Villa Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Aston Villa make the trip to Monaco tonight to kick off the penultimate round of Champions League matches. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-...

Aston Villa is delighted to announce the signing of Andrés García from Levante. The full-back joins Villa for an undisclosed fee. Energetic and with an eye for goal, he has registered three goals and three assists so far this season. Capable of operating at right-back or further up the flank, the 21-year-old native of Valencia came through the ranks at Levante before breaking into the first team. Welcome, Andrés! 🇪🇸

arts.ttl: From Portugal: Wolves consider proposal for Sporting player, Fulham and Aston Villa also keen
arts.sum: Not to be deterred after losing out on Manu Silva to Benfica at the last minute, Wolves are returning to fish in the Portuguese transfer pond. Tuesday’s edition of O Jogo reports Wolves have been considering presenting a proposal to Sporting CP to sign Geny Catamo. arts.sum: Aston Villa face AS Monaco for the first time ever in the penultimate round of the Uefa Champions League league phase on Tuesday. The Villans can virtually confirm their place in the last 16 with victory in the microstate as they currently sit in 4th place in the league standings. Diego Costa heading off for new horizons in the Turkish Super Lig meant the Premier League club were able to move more concretely for the Sevilla player. arts.ttl: Unai Emery lifts lid on 'very important' conversation with Youri Tielemans
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery believes Youri Tielemans' best qualities are "his mind and his mentality". After a slow start last season, the Belgian now believes he is playing the best football of his career and Emery has hailed his commitment in striving for improvement after hitting a low point in his career 20 months ago.
